recent_calls.summary: The user requested to speak with a live person, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.

The user called and was quickly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent, Sophie, acknowledged the user and initiated the transfer without completing any other interaction.

Roselyn from American Home Shield called Budget to get a follow-up update on a dispatch related to a technician visit and payment. The agent, Sophie, acknowledged the request and transferred the call to a live agent who could provide the needed information.
The user called and requested to be connected to a live agent. The virtual assistant confirmed and successfully transferred the call to a human agent.

Margaret called to schedule an air conditioning service appointment through her American Home Shield home warranty. The agent confirmed details, noted the lack of a dispatch number, and informed her that Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing would contact her shortly. Margaret declined additional maintenance program information but provided positive feedback on the call experience.

Roberta called to confirm the timing of her repair appointment, initially thinking it was at 8 AM based on a text message. The agent clarified that the technician Amory is scheduled to arrive between 11 AM and noon today. Roberta confirmed she would be waiting and had no further questions or updates.
The user called to get an estimate for a laundry stack and was promptly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent facilitated the transfer without any issues.

The user called to inquire about the cost and scheduling of their annual cooling system maintenance. The agent could not provide exact pricing but arranged for the team to follow up with details and successfully booked the user for routine maintenance on June 10th at 8 AM. The user was satisfied with the service and provided positive feedback.

The user called to schedule an appointment for air conditioning service, mentioning they had already spoken to someone and were waiting for a callback. The agent attempted to assist but transferred the call to a live agent for further help.

The user called to follow up on a text message about a previous issue and was transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent acknowledged the request and successfully transferred the call. No further conversation occurred before the transfer.

Margaret called to check the status of her air conditioning service request. The agent confirmed her details but could not find an appointment in the system and offered to transfer her to a live representative, which Margaret accepted. The call ended with a successful transfer to a live agent.

The user called in response to a text message about a past issue and was promptly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent acknowledged the request and completed a successful call transfer.

Margaret called to schedule an urgent air conditioning service due to no cooling and expected heat. The agent documented the request and flagged it for priority follow-up, informing Margaret that the team will contact her on the next business day. The call ended with no further requests from Margaret.

The user, Dorothy, called to update her appointment to the earliest available date. The agent confirmed the request and informed her that the team would follow up on the next business day to confirm the new appointment date. No special instructions were provided by the user.

The user reported that their air conditioner outside unit was not coming on and requested to schedule a service appointment for the next day. The agent confirmed the service address and contact details, noted no special instructions, and assured the user that the request would be passed along for follow-up.
The call was very brief and disconnected abruptly after the agent's initial greeting and request for the user's ZIP code. The user did not provide any information or engage further.

The user called to inquire about the cost of preventative HVAC maintenance. The agent explained that exact pricing could not be provided over the phone but offered to have the team contact the user with details. The user provided their name and phone number, confirmed the service address, and expressed interest in preventative maintenance.

Margaret called to report that her air conditioner is blowing warm air, not shutting off, and not reaching the set temperature. The agent confirmed her service request and assured her that the team would prioritize her case and contact her soon. Margaret declined information about maintenance programs and provided positive feedback about the virtual assistant.

Margaret Goldsmith called to report that the air conditioning in one of the units at her property at 2514 Blair Avenue, St. Louis, MO 63106, was not working at all. She requested service preferably tonight or tomorrow morning. The agent collected all necessary details, confirmed the address and contact information, and informed her that the service request would be passed along to the team. Margaret declined to provide an email and chose to call back later regarding maintenance programs.

The user called after hours requesting to speak to a live representative. The agent informed the user that live representatives were unavailable and offered to take their information for a follow-up. The call ended shortly after without the user providing further details.
The call was very brief, with the agent introducing herself but no further conversation occurred before the user hung up.
The user called to inquire about an appointment scheduled for today, but the call ended abruptly before the agent could provide a full response or assistance.

The user called Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing after hours seeking information about their scheduled appointment time. The agent informed the user that the live schedule was not accessible but offered to have the team confirm the appointment time the next business day. The user confirmed their phone number and requested a voicemail if they do not answer the callback.

The user, Alexander, left a message after hours indicating that financing for a new AC unit at 1720 Chouteau Avenue, Unit 302 has been approved and requested a callback for details regarding heating and cooling service. The agent confirmed the message details and informed Alexander that someone from the team would follow up on the next business day. Alexander declined additional information about maintenance programs and feedback requests.

The user called to confirm if a technician was still coming that afternoon. The agent informed the user that appointment confirmations cannot be made after hours but assured that the team will follow up on the next business day. The call ended shortly after without further assistance.

Jeffrey Gaddy called to follow up on a previous inquiry and to find out if there was an answer, as he was expecting a callback. The agent informed him that live transfers were not available after 4 PM but documented his request for a callback on the next business day. The call ended with Jeffrey acknowledging and thanking the agent.

The call was very brief and disjointed, with the user and agent exchanging incomplete phrases. The user seemed to be asking about getting someone, but the conversation did not progress meaningfully before the user hung up.

Mary called to request an immediate callback from a technician regarding her AC unit not turning on during regular business hours. The agent clarified that direct technician connection is not available after 4 PM, but assured Mary that her details were documented and a representative would call her back on the next business day. The call ended with the user understanding the callback arrangement.

The user reported that their air conditioner, installed in April, is not working due to a fuse that keeps tripping. The agent scheduled a service appointment for the earliest available time tomorrow and confirmed the user's address and contact details. The user declined to provide any special instructions for the technician.

The user called to cancel an appointment scheduled for the next day. The agent confirmed the cancellation request and informed the user that the team would follow up on the next business day to confirm. The user expressed gratitude and ended the call.

Margaret called to schedule a service appointment for her air conditioning, which is not cooling properly. The agent confirmed her details and informed her that the team would follow up to confirm the appointment. Margaret declined information about maintenance programs and feedback requests.

Mary Watson called to schedule an appointment for her air conditioner, which is not coming on. She provided her service address and preferred the earliest available appointment. She declined information about maintenance programs and gave positive feedback about the call experience.

The user called to request a receipt or invoice for work done at their house in Kirkwood around June 2, 2026. The agent was unable to access billing information directly and transferred the call to the billing team for assistance.

The user, Carol, scheduled a routine summer air conditioning maintenance appointment for Friday, June 12th at 10 AM after discussing availability with the agent. The agent confirmed the booking and informed Carol about the standard dispatch fee and that a human agent would follow up to confirm the exact time. Carol provided positive feedback about the quick scheduling process.

The user called to report a possible issue with a broken fan wing on their hitch rack and attempted to get assistance. The call ended abruptly after the user repeatedly tried to get the agent's attention without response. No resolution or further action was completed during the call.
The user called Budget and was quickly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent, Sophie, initiated the transfer without engaging in a detailed conversation.
The user called and was quickly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent, Sophie, greeted the user and then initiated a call transfer without further conversation.
The agent greeted the user and attempted to connect her with a live representative. The call was then transferred successfully to another agent for further assistance.
The user called and requested to speak with a live person. The agent acknowledged the request and transferred the call to a live agent successfully.
The agent greeted the user and attempted to connect them with a live agent for further assistance. The call was then successfully transferred to another number.

Martin McQuiller called to schedule an urgent appointment for his broken air conditioning unit. The agent booked a provisional appointment for the next day at 8 AM and confirmed the details with Martin. Martin was satisfied with the easy setup process and provided positive feedback.

Jason Woods called to report that his air conditioning is not blowing cool air after a new unit installation and previous heating repair. He requested a service visit as soon as possible to address the cooling issue. The agent confirmed his contact details and service address and assured that the team would be notified promptly.
The user called and was greeted by the agent Sophie, who then transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance. The call lasted 16 seconds and ended with a successful transfer.
The user called and requested to speak with CJ. The agent attempted to connect the user and successfully transferred the call to the appropriate agent.

The user, Kelly, called to schedule an air filter service, thermostat check, and regular servicing for the property at 226 Leduc Oaks Circle, St. Louis. After discussing available times, Kelly booked an appointment for Thursday, June 11th at 4 PM. The call ended positively with Kelly providing feedback and the agent confirming the booking and next steps.
The user called Budget and requested to speak to a representative. The agent acknowledged the request and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.
The user requested to speak to a customer service representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.

Allen Burnett called to reschedule his American Home Shield heating and cooling appointment for tomorrow morning. The agent confirmed the details and informed him that a representative would contact him to confirm availability. Allen declined information about maintenance programs and feedback requests.

The user, Theresa from USSP shipping, called and requested to be connected to Nick. The agent attempted to transfer the call to the requested contact. The call ended shortly after the transfer attempt.
